cover.removeConfirmDescription: This will clear the course cover image.

footer.tagline: Structured biblical teaching for learners who take Scripture seriously.

features.heading: What's in Equip
features.subheading: Tools for serious Scripture study — no distractions, no lost progress.

systematic.title: Structured courses
systematic.body: Each course is broken into modules and chapters — you follow the structure, not stray fragments.

progress.title: Per-chapter progress
progress.body: See what's done and what's left. A clear "Done" action on every chapter.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.body: Complete a course and get a certificate — publicly verifiable by number.

bilingual.title: Bilingual
bilingual.body: Russian and English — switch in one click, no reload needed.

how.heading: How it works
how.step1: Sign up — takes a minute, email or Google is enough.
how.step2: Open the catalog and enroll in the course you want.
how.step3: Work through chapters, take quizzes, claim your certificate at the end.

catalog.title: Course catalog
catalog.body: Every published course — browse and enroll.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.body: Already have an account? Pick up where you left off.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.body: Forgot it? We'll email you a reset link.

finalCta.heading: Ready to start?
finalCta.body: Sign up in a minute — courses are free, progress saves automatically.

dashboard.loadCoursesError: Could not load your courses. Please try refreshing the page.
dashboard.noEnrollments: You haven't enrolled in any courses yet. Browse the catalog to get started.

student.title: Welcome to Equip, {{name}}
student.body: A quiet place to learn the Bible at your own pace. Each course here is written by a real teacher — pick a subject that draws you and begin.

teacher.title: Your first course starts here
teacher.body: Equip is your classroom. Lay out a course in chapters, write your own quizzes, sign certificates when students finish — and keep ownership of every word the whole way.

completion.title: You finished {{courseTitle}}
completion.body: Take a moment. When you're ready, you can request your certificate of completion.
completion.bodyHasCert: Take a moment. Your certificate is just below on this page — it will be reviewed shortly.

privacy.title: Before we begin
privacy.intro: A short read so you know what Equip stores and what it doesn't. Full version available any time from the footer.

bullets.collect: We store your name, email, avatar, and what you do on your courses (progress, quiz answers, certificates) — only what's needed to run the platform for you.
bullets.share: We don't sell your data and we don't share it with third parties for advertising. Anonymous performance telemetry helps us spot bugs (Datadog).
bullets.control: You can edit or delete your account at any time from your profile.

privacy.checkbox: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service

setup.title: Make Equip yours
setup.intro: A few choices to set things up. You can change every one of these later from your profile.

avatar.label: Profile photo
avatar.tooBig: Image must be 2 MB or less.

name.label: Display name
name.hint: Pre-filled from your sign-up — edit it if you want a different display name.

email.label: Email
email.hint: To change your email, head to Profile after setup.

setup.saveFailed: Couldn't save your changes — they'll stay as the previous values. You can update from your profile.

picker.title: Pick a course to begin with
picker.titleNamed: {{name}}, pick a course to begin with
picker.intro: Tap any card to add it to your shelf. You can pick more than one. We'll open the first one for you so you can start right away.
picker.enrollMany: Enroll in {{count}} and open the first
picker.loadFailed: Couldn't load the catalog — check your connection and try again.
picker.enrollAllFailed: Couldn't enroll — please try again, or browse the catalog manually.
picker.enrollSomeFailed: Enrolled in part of your selection. Open the rest from the catalog.

splash.body: Take a breath. We're opening the first chapter.

welcome.title: Welcome to Equip — let's take a quick look
welcome.body: We'll walk through the main parts of the app together. Each click on 'Next' moves to the next stop; you can leave the tour at any time.

headerNav.title: Your main sections
headerNav.body: Home, Courses, Calendar, Certificates — switch between them from this top bar at any time. Whatever you have open, the bar stays.

headerProfile.title: Your account
headerProfile.body: Picture, name, language, theme, sign out — all of it lives behind this button. We'll pass by it again at the end of the tour.

calendar.title: Your calendar
calendar.body: Anything due or scheduled across all your enrolled courses — assignments, classes, events — appears here. If you don't have any courses yet, it'll be empty.

finale.title: That's Equip
finale.body: You've seen the main surfaces. Open a course from the catalog when you're ready. The welcome card on your dashboard has a 'Take a tour' link if you ever want to revisit any single page.

myCourses.title: Your courses
myCourses.body: Every course you enroll in lands here. Tap one to keep going from where you left off.

verse.title: Verse of the day
verse.body: A new passage every morning — a quiet way to begin before the lesson plan.

today.title: Today's calendar
today.body: Anything due or scheduled for today — assignments, classes, events — surfaces here.

streak.title: Daily practice
streak.body: A gentle streak of the days you've engaged with Equip. Skip a day, no guilt.

finale.title: That's the tour
finale.body: Browse the catalog when you're ready to enroll. You can replay this tour any time from the welcome panel.

search.title: Find a course
search.body: Type a word from the title or description — search hits as you type. No results? Browse the grid below by topic.

grid.title: Browse by card
grid.body: Every published course shows up as a card with its title, a short description, and an enroll button. Tap one to open.

finale.title: Enjoy the catalog
finale.body: When you find something interesting, open it and enroll. Your dashboard will start filling up with your courses.

header.title: Course overview
header.body: Title, description, and an enroll button if you're not in yet — or your progress bar once you are. Everything you need to start.

modules.title: Modules and chapters
modules.body: The course is laid out in modules; each module has chapters. Click a chapter to open it. Locked ones unlock as you progress.

finale.title: Ready when you are
finale.body: Start with the first chapter. We'll track your progress and surface the next step automatically.

header.title: Where you are
header.body: The eyebrow tells you which chapter you're on (e.g. 'Chapter 2 of 7') and what kind it is — reading, quiz, exam, or assignment.

body.title: The chapter content
body.body: Read, take a quiz, or submit an assignment depending on the chapter type. Your progress saves automatically as you go.

nav.title: Move between chapters
nav.body: Use these buttons to jump to the previous or next chapter without going back to the module list.

finale.title: Take your time
finale.body: There's no clock. Work through the chapter at your pace and click 'Next' when you're ready.

header.title: Your certificates
header.body: Every course you've completed lands here. Approved certificates carry a unique number you can share or verify.

finale.title: Earn your first
finale.body: Finish a course and request a certificate from the course page. Once a teacher and admin approve it, it appears here.

grid.title: The month at a glance
grid.body: Every event from every course you're enrolled in shows up here. Click a day to see what's on.

upcoming.title: What's coming up
upcoming.body: A list of the next events in chronological order, so you don't have to flip through months.

finale.title: Stay on top of things
finale.body: Filter by course at the top if you only want to see one. Everything else updates as your teachers publish events.

form.title: Your profile
form.body: Update your name, avatar, and language preference here. Changes save when you click outside the field.

finale.title: All yours
finale.body: Your name and avatar appear on certificates and to your teachers. The language preference flips the whole app.

newCourse.title: Create a course
newCourse.body: Open the editor here. You'll lay out modules, write chapters and quizzes, and publish when ready.

pendingCerts.title: Pending certificates
pendingCerts.body: Students who finished your courses request certificates here. Approve or reject in two clicks.

coursesList.title: Your courses
coursesList.body: Once you have published material, every course shows up here with quick toggles for publish, clone, edit and analytics.

finale.title: That's the tour
finale.body: You can replay this tour from the welcome panel whenever you want a refresher.

header.title: Course settings
header.body: Title, description, cover image, publish state — edit any of these inline. Save happens automatically when you click away.

tabs.title: More course tools
tabs.body: Announcements, materials, calendar events, cohort enrollment — all the secondary editing tools live behind this menu.

modules.title: Modules and chapters
modules.body: Add a module, then add chapters inside it. Drag to reorder. Click a chapter to open its editor.

finale.title: Build at your pace
finale.body: Save draft early, publish when ready. Students can't see drafts; you can preview them any time.

title.title: Module details
title.body: Edit the module's title, description, and due date inline. Changes save when you click outside the field.

chapters.title: Chapters in this module
chapters.body: Add chapters (reading, quiz, exam, or assignment), drag to reorder, click to edit. Lock chapters that should unlock in order.

finale.title: Module on track
finale.body: When you're done, head back to the course editor to see how this module fits into the bigger picture.

header.title: Chapter settings
header.body: Title, type (reading / quiz / exam / assignment), lock state. These choose what the student sees when they open the chapter.

blocks.title: Content blocks
blocks.body: Build the chapter out of blocks: rich text, files, a quiz, or an assignment. Drag to reorder. Each block saves on its own.

finale.title: Author at your pace
finale.body: Preview as a student any time from the course page. Drafts stay hidden until you publish the course.

table.title: Your gradebook
table.body: Every enrolled student gets a row; every gradable chapter gets a column. Click a cell to enter or update a grade.

finale.title: Grades flow back
finale.body: Students see their grades on the course page and on their dashboard. Updates here surface immediately.

stats.title: Course at a glance
stats.body: Enrollment count, average progress, completion rate, average grade — the headline numbers for this course.

finale.title: Watch how it lands
finale.body: Numbers update in real time as students enrol, finish chapters, and submit work. No refresh needed.

table.title: Per-student progress
table.body: Every enrolled student with their progress percentage and last activity. Click a student to drill into their detailed view.

finale.title: Coaching view
finale.body: Spot students who haven't logged in lately, or those stuck on a chapter. A nudge from you often makes the difference.

courses.pageSubtitle: Browse our seminary courses and deepen your biblical knowledge
courses.pageSubtitleAuthed: Discover more courses to expand your knowledge
courses.checkBackSoon: Check back soon for new courses
courses.loadFailed: Failed to load courses. Please try again later.

streak.title: Today's Practice
streak.comingSoon: Daily tasks land soon — this is the placeholder.

tasksPreview.questionOfDay: Answer the question of the day

auth.signInSubheading: Sign in to continue your learning journey
auth.marketingQuote: Study to shew thyself approved unto God, a workman that needeth not to be ashamed.

resetPassword.successBody: Your password has been updated successfully.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

chapter.submitAssignmentToComplete: Submit the assignment to complete this chapter

quiz.failedLoad: Failed to load quiz. Please try refreshing the page.
quiz.pendingTeacherReview: Open-ended answers are pending teacher review

validation.validScoreRequired: Enter a valid score (0 or higher)

questions.empty: No questions yet. Click "Add Question" to start.
questions.shortAnswerHint: Students will type a free-text answer. Graded manually.
questions.essayHint: Long-form written response. Graded manually from the Submissions tab.

review.loadFailed: Failed to load submissions. Please try again.
review.emptyAllGraded: Nothing to grade — you're all caught up.

blockEditor.empty: No blocks yet. Add your first content block below.

confirmDelete.description: All student submissions will also be deleted.

certificates.title: My Certificates
certificates.emptyDescription: Complete a course to earn your first certificate. Keep learning and collecting achievements!

card.completedDescription: Request your certificate of completion for review.
card.pendingDescription: Your certificate request has been submitted. Your instructor will review it shortly.
card.adminPendingDescription: Your teacher has approved your certificate. It is now pending final admin approval.
card.approvedDescription: Congratulations! Your certificate has been approved.
card.rejectedDescription: Unfortunately, your certificate request was rejected. You may re-request after addressing any outstanding requirements.

review.heading: How was this course? Leave a review
review.commentPlaceholder: Share your thoughts about this course... (optional)

table.description: Click a row to view detailed breakdown

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.loadError: Failed to load calendar events. Please try again.
calendar.noEnrollmentsDescription: Enroll in a course to see its deadlines, exams, and live sessions on your calendar.

teacher.confirmTrashDescription: You can restore it from trash later.

createForm.title: Create New Course
createForm.descriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of the course...
createForm.editorHint: Cover image, modules, calendar, and everything else are set up in the editor next.

confirmDelete.title: Permanently delete this course?
confirmDelete.description: This will permanently delete the course and all its data (modules, chapters, enrollments, grades). This action cannot be undone.

teacherEditor.noModulesYetDescription: Add your first module to start building the course.

confirm.deleteModuleDescription: All chapters inside the module will also be removed.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this chapter?
confirmDelete.description: The chapter and its content will be removed.

notFound.title: Module not found
notFound.description: The module may have been deleted or you may not have access.

noChapters.title: No chapters yet
noChapters.description: Add your first chapter to start building this module.

notFound.title: Course not found
notFound.description: The course may have been deleted or you may not have access.

accessMode.title: Course access mode
accessMode.publicDescription: Anyone signed in can self-enroll, subject to the enrollment window.
accessMode.instituteDescription: Students cannot self-enroll. Add them via a cohort in the admin panel.

notFound.title: Chapter not found
notFound.description: The chapter may have been deleted or you may not have access.

leaveConfirm.title: Leave without saving?
leaveConfirm.description: You have unsaved changes. They will be lost if you leave now.

courseDetail.byInvitationOnlyHint: This course is part of an institute program. The program directors enroll students directly — please contact them.
courseDetail.enrollmentClosedAllCohorts: Enrollment window is closed for all available cohorts.
courseDetail.noCohortsAvailable: No cohorts are currently available for this course.
courseDetail.moduleLockHint: Complete all assessments in the previous module to unlock.

cohortSelect.title: Select a Cohort
cohortSelect.intro: Multiple cohorts are available. Choose one to enroll in:

gradebook.failedLoad: Failed to load gradebook. Please try again.

config.title: Grading Configuration
config.description: Set how quizzes, assignments, and participation contribute to final grades

summary.title: Student Grades
summary.description: Auto-calculated based on quiz scores, assignment grades, and chapter completion. Click a student to override manually.

table.title: Student Grade Table
table.description: Reading/video chapters = 1 pt for completion · Quiz/exam = scored · Assignment = teacher-graded pts

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Manage users, roles, and monitor platform activity

cohorts.title: Cohorts
cohorts.emptyNoCohorts: No cohorts yet. Create one to start enrolling students in batches.
cohorts.notFoundDescription: This cohort may have been deleted.
cohorts.addStudentHint: Enter the student's email. They must already have an Equip account — invite them to sign up first if not.
cohorts.errorUserNotFound: No Equip user with that email — ask them to sign up first.
cohorts.errorCohortFull: Cohort has reached its maximum capacity.
cohorts.noCoursesAttached: No courses attached. Click "Attach course" to add one.
cohorts.noStudents: No students yet. Click "Add student" to enroll one.
cohorts.completeConfirmDescription: Students keep their enrollments and grades; the cohort just stops being editable.
cohorts.deleteConfirmDescription: Student enrollments and grades are preserved (cohort link cleared). This cannot be undone.
cohorts.detachConfirmDescription: Existing student enrollments in this course are kept (cohort link cleared) so grades survive.
cohorts.removeStudentConfirmDescription: Their enrollments and grades stay — only the cohort link is cleared.

users.title: Users
users.deleteSelfTooltip: You cannot delete your own account

pendingTeachers.title: Pending Teacher Approvals
pendingTeachers.approveHint: Approving lets them create + publish courses on the platform.

confirm.approveDescription: {{name}} will gain access to teacher features.

pendingCerts.title: Certificate Approvals
pendingCerts.approveHint: Approving issues a public certificate number visible at /verify/<num>.

overview.pendingHint: Teacher + certificate approvals waiting on you
overview.loadError: Failed to load admin data. Please try again.

confirm.deleteUserDescription: This permanently removes their account, enrollments, submissions, grades, certificates, and notifications. Courses they created will be kept but disassociated. This cannot be undone.
confirm.bulkRoleDescription: {{count}} user(s) will be set to role "{{role}}".

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.errorTableMissing: The audit_logs table may not exist yet. Deploy the latest migration.

authRegister.heading: Create an account
authRegister.subheading: Choose your role and start learning today

errors.fullNameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

duplicate.heading: Account may exist
duplicate.subheading: This email might already be registered
duplicate.bodyExists: An account with {{email}} may already exist.
duplicate.bodyHint: Please try signing in instead, or use the "Forgot password" option if you can't remember your credentials.

success.subheadingDefault: Almost there — just one more step
success.subheadingTeacher: One more step before you can start teaching
success.body: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}.
success.clickLinkToActivate: Click the link in the email to activate your account.
success.teacherApprovalBanner: After confirming your email, your teacher account will need to be approved by an administrator. You'll be able to log in, but course creation tools will be available once approved.

validation.titleTooLong: Title must be 300 characters or fewer
validation.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters

toast.audioUrlInvalid: Audio URL must start with http(s)

prompt.addLinkDescription: Paste or type the URL you want to link to. Leave empty to remove an existing link.
prompt.uploadFailedDescription: We couldn't upload the file. Paste an image URL instead, or cancel.
prompt.audioDescription: Paste a direct https:// URL to an audio file (mp3, m4a, ogg).

reading.label: Lesson
reading.description: Mix text, video, audio, files and more into a single lesson

courseReadiness.title: Course readiness
courseReadiness.allPassed: Everything looks good — your course is ready to publish.

publishConfirm.title: Publish despite missing items?
publishConfirm.description_one: This course still has {{count}} critical item that students would notice. You can publish anyway, but it is usually better to fix these first.
publishConfirm.description_other: This course still has {{count}} critical items that students would notice. You can publish anyway, but it is usually better to fix these first.

checks.hasDescription: The course has a description for the catalog.
checks.hasCoverImage: The course has a cover image.
checks.hasEnrollmentWindow: Enrollment open / close dates are set.
checks.hasAtLeastOneModule: The course has at least one module.
checks.hasMultipleModules: The course has two or more modules.
checks.quizHasQuestion: Quiz in "{{title}}" has at least one question.
checks.examHasQuestion: Exam in "{{title}}" has at least one question.
checks.quizQuestionsComplete: Every question in "{{title}}" has the answers it needs (options, correct marker).
checks.assignmentHasBrief: Assignment in "{{title}}" has a brief / description.
checks.quizWeightNonzero: Quizzes count toward the final grade.
checks.assignmentWeightNonzero: Assignments count toward the final grade.
